name: seller-rating-optimizer-skill
description: Analyze marketplace seller ratings, identify rating drag factors, and generate an action plan to improve seller scores on Amazon, eBay, Shopee, and similar platforms.
author: alphaparkinc

current_metrics.description: Current seller metrics: overall_rating, positive_pct, response_time_hours, late_shipment_rate, defect_rate, cancellation_rate.

platform.description: Marketplace platform (amazon, ebay, shopee, etsy, walmart).

risk_flags.description: Metrics below platform threshold triggering risk.

action_plan.description: Prioritized actions to improve seller rating.

projected_improvement.description: Projected rating improvement if actions taken.
